_: WEEKLY SLATE — Ness's ephemeral this-weekend-only controls from the Curation Board (▲ LEAD / ▼ LATER / dragged PILE-ORDER). Applies ONLY while `weekend` matches the pipeline's upcoming Saturday (YYYY-MM-DD): a stale file is silently ignored, so weekend calls can never drag into the next week. LEAD = guaranteed into the feed + opens the deck (just under 👑 TOPs) + editorScore floor 9. LATER = stays in the feed but sinks to the back of the pile (NOT a kill). PILE = the hand-dragged opening order from the board (ordered titles) — stamped as pilePos; the app deals those cards first, in exactly this order, above every other tier. Permanent taste lives in corpus.json; this file is the week's front page.
pile: Nederland – Japan. Door de tijd verbonden
